title: Welcome to Nyx's Blog
author: Sina
excerpt: Introducing Nyx's Blog - a space for security research, CEH preparation, and penetration testing notes. Green screen aesthetics meet modern web design.

title: Building Your First Penetration Testing Lab
author: Sina
excerpt: Step-by-step guide to setting up a complete penetration testing lab with Kali Linux, Docker containers, and vulnerable applications for hands-on learning.

title: DVWA Deep Dive: SQL Injection Basics
author: Sina
excerpt: Exploring SQL injection vulnerabilities in DVWA. Learn how attacks work, detection methods, and mitigation strategies through practical examples.

title: Essential Kali Linux Tools for CEH
author: Sina
excerpt: A comprehensive guide to the most important tools in Kali Linux for ethical hacking. Includes nmap, Burp Suite, Metasploit, and more with practical usage examples.

title: CEH Exam Preparation Strategy
author: Sina
excerpt: Tips and strategies for preparing for the Certified Ethical Hacker exam. Study timeline, key topics, practice resources, and exam day advice.
